parameters.name: Sample Group Column Name
parameters.description: Column name distinguishing sample groups in the input sample metadata file
parameters.help_text: The column from the sample metadata containing the sample group information. This is usually a column showing to which experimental treatments each sample belongs (e.g. WildType, Knockout, Tumor, Normal, Before, After, etc.).

parameters.name: Label Column Name
parameters.description: The column name describing sample names in your input metadata file
parameters.help_text: The column from the sample metadata containing the sample labels as you wish them to appear in the plots produced by this template. This can be the same Sample Names Column. However, you may desire different labels to display on your figure (e.g. shorter labels are sometimes preferred on plots). In that case, select the column with your preferred Labels here. The selected column should contain unique names for each sample. (Default– sample_id)

parameters.name: Minimum Count Value
parameters.description: Minimum Count Value to be considered non-zero
parameters.help_text: Minimum count value to be considered non-zero for a sample

parameters.name: Min number of samples with nonzero counts
parameters.description: Minimum number of samples with nonzero counts in total
parameters.help_text: Minimum number of samples (total) with non-zero counts

parameters.name: Min number of samples with nonzero counts in group
parameters.description: Minimum number of samples with nonzero counts in a group
parameters.help_text: Only keeps genes that have at least this number of samples with nonzero CPM counts in at least one group

parameters.name: Covariates
parameters.description: Column Names of your covariates (eg. "condition", "batch", "sex")
parameters.help_text: Columns to be used as covariates in linear modeling. Must include column from "Contrast Variable". Most commonly your covariate will be group and batch (if you have different batches in your data).

parameters.name: Contrast Column
parameters.description: What variable to perform DE testing against.
parameters.help_text: The column in the metadata that contains the group variables you wish to find differential expression between. Up to 2 columns (2-factor analysis) can be used.

parameters.name: Contrast to Perform
parameters.description: Specify each contrast in the format "group1-group2", e.g. "treated-control"

parameters.name: Signficance Cutoff
parameters.description: Features will only be kept if their significance_column is less then this cutoff threshold

parameters.name: Fold Change Cutoff
parameters.description: Features will only be kept if the absolute value of their logFC is greater than or equal to this cutoff threshold

parameters.name: Contrast Filter
parameters.description: Choose whether to filter contrasts in our analysis.
parameters.help_text: If "keep", only the contrast names listed in contrasts will be included. If "remove, the contrast names listed by contrasts will be removed. If "none", all contrasts in the dataset are used. Options: "keep", "remove", or "none"

parameters.name: Contrast Names Filter
parameters.description: Contrast names to filter by with the "contrast filter" option
parameters.help_text: If contrast_filter is "none", this parameter has no effect.

parameters.name: Group Filter
parameters.description: Choose whether to filter groups in or out of analysis.
parameters.help_text: Whether to filter groups in or out of analysis. If "keep", only the group names listed in groups will be included. If "remove", the group names listed by groups will be removed. If "none", all groups in the dataset are used.

parameters.name: Group Name Filter
parameters.description: Group names to filter with the "groups_filter" option.

parameters.name: Label Font Size
parameters.description: Font size for labels in the plot (default: 6)

parameters.name: Label Distance
parameters.description: Distance of labels from the bars (default: 1)

parameters.name: Y axis expansion
parameters.description: Expansion of the y-axis (default: 0.08)

parameters.name: Fill Colors
parameters.description: Fill colors for the bars

parameters.name: Bar Width
parameters.description: Width of the bars

parameters.name: Bar Border
parameters.description: Whether to draw borders around bars (default: TRUE)

parameters.name: Plot Title Fontsize
parameters.description: Font size for plot titles
